mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_NO boardNo , CONSUMER_NO consumerNo , BOARD_TITLE title , BOARD_CONTENT content , WRITEN_DATE wirtenDate FROM FRUIT_BOARD JOIN CONSUMER USING(CONSUMER_NO)
SELECT BOARD_NO boardNo , CONSUMER_NO consumerNo , BOARD_TITLE title , BOARD_CONTENT content , WRITEN_DATE wirtenDate FROM FRUIT_BOARD WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}

SELECT BOARD_NO boardNo , CONSUMER_NO consumerNo , BOARD_TITLE title , BOARD_CONTENT content , WRITEN_DATE wirtenDate FROM FRUIT_BOARD F , CONSUMER C WHERE C.CONSUMER_NO = #{csmNo} AND C.CONSUMER_NO = F.CONSUMER_NO
